name: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc.
business: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. is a leading global producer, distributor, and marketer of value-added frozen potato products. French fries represent most of its value-added frozen potato product portfolio. The company sells to quick service and full-service restaurants, foodservice distributors, non-commercial channels, and retailers in over 100 countries.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to spend approximately $100 million in fiscal 2026 to comply with environmental regulations, including those related to discharges into the air, land, and water.

catalysts.event: Pension plan termination and annuity purchase
catalysts.sentence: During fiscal 2026, we expect to complete the purchase of group annuity contracts that will transfer any remaining pension benefit obligation to an insurance company.
